briefdescription.para: Maximum clock index (one past the last valid index).
Define a clock entry for a peripheral with numerical suffix.

detaileddescription.para: Used for peripherals with an index, for example SPI0, SPI1, UART0.

briefdescription.para: Define a clock entry for a single-instance peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Used for peripherals that have only one instance, for example DMAC, SDH, SDD, USB, TRNG, etc.

briefdescription.para: Define a clock entry for a single-instance peripheral without FEN bit.

detaileddescription.para: Used when a peripheral clock has no separate enable bit.

memberdef.name: AMEBA_LTIM_PERIPHS
memberdef.initializer: AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(LTIM, 0) /* AMEBA_LTIM0_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(LTIM, 1) /* AMEBA_LTIM1_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(LTIM, 2) /* AMEBA_LTIM2_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(LTIM, 3) /* AMEBA_LTIM3_CLK */

memberdef.name: AMEBA_PWM_PERIPHS
memberdef.initializer: AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(PWM, 0) /* AMEBA_PWM0_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(PWM, 1) /* AMEBA_PWM1_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(PWM, 2) /* AMEBA_PWM2_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(PWM, 3) /* AMEBA_PWM3_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(PWM, 4) /* AMEBA_PWM4_CLK */

memberdef.name: AMEBA_UART_PERIPHS
memberdef.initializer: AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(UART, 0) /* AMEBA_UART0_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(UART, 1) /* AMEBA_UART1_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(UART, 2) /* AMEBA_UART2_CLK */ \ AMEBA_NUMERICAL_PERIPH(UART, 3) /* AMEBA_UART3_CLK */

briefdescription.para: RTC clock peripheral mapping (no FEN bit).

memberdef.name: AMEBA_CORE_PERIPHS
memberdef.initializer: AMEBA_RTC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_PWM_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_LEDC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_UART_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_LOGUART_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_ADC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_GPIO_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_LTIM_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_PTIM_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_DMAC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_SDH_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_SDD_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_SPI_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_USB_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_FLASH_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_SPORT_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_AC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_I2C_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_TRNG_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_LCDC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_A2C_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_GMAC_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_PPE_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_MJPEG_PERIPHS \ AMEBA_BTON_PERIPHS

detaileddescription.para: This macro expands to mappings of all core peripherals used by the clock control implementation.
